label: Active Mirror Shared Core

services.label: Runtime Steward
services.purpose: Observe, route, prioritize, and write back governed outcomes.

services.label: TokenShield
services.purpose: Control routing, spend, caching, and privacy-aware escalation.

services.label: Trust Layer
services.purpose: Attach provenance, confidence, evidence, review state, and audit.

services.label: Benchmark Factory
services.purpose: Generate methodology-driven indexes, scorecards, and confidence-labeled outputs.

services.label: Coverage OS
services.purpose: Turn messy source universes into tracked coverage, repair, and enrichment programs.

services.label: Report Engine
services.purpose: Produce board-ready briefs, exports, APIs, and recurring payloads.

services.label: Operator Console
services.purpose: Surface queues, approvals, source health, and audit history.

control_plane_rules: Shared core logic may be reused across products.
Customer data, prompts, and entitlements stay product-scoped.
Client-facing apps should not expose internal orchestration language by default.
